subcodes.first_line: The Book, sent down in truth from the presence of the Wronged One unto him whom the breeze of revelation awakened in the days of God, the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی المظلوم الی الذی ایقظته نسمه الوحی فی ایام الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @station of the Manifestation of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
